weekly_summary: Over the past 2 days, our security landscape has been characterized by a total of 6 findings, tracking 8 unique CVEs, with each of the identified vulnerabilities, including CVE-2026-31972, CVE-2026-25873, CVE-2026-32321, CVE-2026-20963, CVE-2025-66376, CVE-2025-71265, CVE-2025-71266, and CVE-2025-71267, being observed only once. The active security domains have included Containers and K8s, Crypto Libraries, OS and Kernel, as well as Web and Servers, with the majority of activity occurring on March 19, 2026.
